fields.name: dbId
fields.description: The unique identifier for the import item.

fields.name: transactionNumber
fields.description: The transaction number.

fields.name: text
fields.description: The text of the journal header.

fields.name: postedDate
fields.description: The posting date of the journal header.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description: The creation timestamp of the journal header.

fields.name: modifiedAt
fields.description: The last modified timestamp of the journal header.

fields.name: ownerDbId
fields.description: The owner identifier of the journal header.

fields.name: importedAt
fields.description: The import timestamp of the journal header.

fields.name: registeredAt
fields.description: The registration timestamp of the journal header.

fields.name: archive
fields.description: Indicates whether the journal header is archive.

fields.name: fiscalYear
fields.description: The fiscal year of the journal header.
